```{r}
#| label: load-packages
#| include: false

library(tidyverse)
library(ggplot2)    
library(ggpattern)
library(dplyr)
library(readr) # Assuming readr might be useful, but sticking to read.table as in original
library(data.table)

mytheme = theme(
#	plot.background = element_rect(fill = 'black', color = "black"), 
	axis.ticks.y = element_line(color = "black", linewidth = 1), 
	axis.ticks.x = element_line(color = "black", linewidth = 1), 
	axis.ticks.length = unit(0.5, "cm"), 
	axis.line.x = element_line(color = "black", linewidth = 2), 
	axis.line.y = element_line(color = "black", linewidth = 2), 
	axis.text.x = element_text(color = 'black', size  = 16, margin = margin(rep(4, 4))), 
	axis.text.y = element_text(color = 'black', size = 16, margin = margin(rep(2, 4))), 
	axis.title.x = element_text(color = "black", size = 14, margin = margin(rep(5, 4))), 
	axis.title.y = element_text(color = "black", size = 14,  margin = margin(rep(5, 4))), 
	plot.title = element_text(color = "black", size = 16, margin = margin(rep(5, 4))), 
	panel.background = element_rect(fill = "white"), 
#	panel.border = element_blank(),
	panel.grid.major.y = element_blank(), 
	panel.grid.minor.y = element_blank(), 
	panel.grid.major.x = element_blank(), 
	panel.grid.minor.x = element_blank(),
	legend.background = element_blank())

#setwd("/Users/yuhenghuang/Documents/Postdoc_UCI/Ancestral_recombination_graph")
```

## 1. singer analysis

### a. check convergent

```{r}
#| label: examine_convergent
#| warning: false
#| echo: false
#| fig-width: 5
#| fig-height: 3
#| fig-align: "center"


# --- Configuration ---
chr <- "3R"

base_path <- "/Users/yuhenghuang/Documents/Postdoc_UCI/Ancestral_recombination_graph/"
output_path <- "/Users/yuhenghuang/Documents/Postdoc_UCI/Ancestral_recombination_graph/"

# --- Load Data ---

# 1. Local TE locations
converg <- read.table(paste0(base_path, "singer_", chr, "_traces.txt"), header = T, fill = T)


# Output
#output_file <- paste0(output_path, hist, "_TE_focal_alter_strain_K9_enrichment_separate_replicates.txt")
output_file <- paste0(output_path, hist, "_TE_focal_alter_strain_K9_avg_count_separate_replicates.txt")
write.table(TE_focal_alter_control_K9, file = output_file, col.names = T, row.names = FALSE, quote = FALSE)
```

### b. TE age and mutation rates

```{r}
#| label: TE_age_mutation
#| warning: false
#| echo: false
#| fig-width: 5
#| fig-height: 3
#| fig-align: "center"

# --- Load and Process TE Taxonomy Data ---
te_taxonomy_file <- "/Users/yuhenghuang/Documents/Postdoc_UCI/names_D_mel_TEs"
te_taxonomy_lines <- readLines(te_taxonomy_file)

# Parse the lines to extract family and superfamily
# Format: >"family_id"#"superfamily_id"
# Remove the leading ">"
te_taxonomy_clean <- str_remove(te_taxonomy_lines, "^>")

# Split by "#"
te_taxonomy_df <- tibble(raw_line = te_taxonomy_clean) %>%
  separate(raw_line, into = c("te_family", "te_superfamily"), sep = "#", extra = "merge", fill = "right") %>%
  # Ensure distinct mapping
  distinct(te_family, .keep_all = TRUE)

te_family_class <- te_taxonomy_df %>%
  separate_wider_delim(
    cols = te_superfamily,       # The column to split
    delim = "/",       # The delimiter to split by
    names = c("class", "super_family"), # The names for the new columns
    too_few = "align_start", # Handle cases with too few delimiters
    too_many = "merge" # Handle cases with too many delimiters
  )

TE_family <- read.csv("/Users/yuhenghuang/Documents/Postdoc_UCI/Ancestral_recombination_graph/Rech_2022_data/TE_annotations/Supplimentary_Data5_family_info.csv", header = T, fill = T)
TE_family_class <- TE_family |> 
  select(Class, Order, SuperFamily, Family, Length)

test_data <- read_tsv("/Users/yuhenghuang/Documents/Postdoc_UCI/Ancestral_recombination_graph/test_TE_mutation_rate_results.tsv")

test_data <- read_tsv("/Users/yuhenghuang/Documents/Postdoc_UCI/Ancestral_recombination_graph/test_TE_mutation_rate_isolated_results.tsv")

test_data <- read_tsv("/Users/yuhenghuang/Documents/Postdoc_UCI/Ancestral_recombination_graph/test_TE_mutation_rate_masked_results_99.tsv")

test_data <- read_tsv("/Users/yuhenghuang/Documents/Postdoc_UCI/Ancestral_recombination_graph/test_TE_mutation_rate_binned_results_99.tsv")

test_data <- read_tsv("/Users/yuhenghuang/Documents/Postdoc_UCI/Ancestral_recombination_graph/redate_TE_mutation_rate_binned_results_99.tsv")


TE_2L <- read_tsv("/Users/yuhenghuang/Documents/Postdoc_UCI/Ancestral_recombination_graph/results/TE_mutation_rate_2L.tsv")
TE_2R <- read_tsv("/Users/yuhenghuang/Documents/Postdoc_UCI/Ancestral_recombination_graph/results/TE_mutation_rate_2R.tsv")
TE_3L <- read_tsv("/Users/yuhenghuang/Documents/Postdoc_UCI/Ancestral_recombination_graph/results/TE_mutation_rate_3L.tsv")
TE_3R <- read_tsv("/Users/yuhenghuang/Documents/Postdoc_UCI/Ancestral_recombination_graph/results/TE_mutation_rate_3R.tsv")
TE_X <- read_tsv("/Users/yuhenghuang/Documents/Postdoc_UCI/Ancestral_recombination_graph/results/TE_mutation_rate_X.tsv")
TE_test <- bind_rows(list(chr2L = TE_2L, chr2R = TE_2R, chr3L = TE_3L, chr3R = TE_3R, chrX = TE_X), .id = "group_name")


strong_snp_2L <- read_tsv("/Users/yuhenghuang/Documents/Postdoc_UCI/Ancestral_recombination_graph/results/strong_mutation_rate_weight_2L.tsv")
strong_snp_2R <- read_tsv("/Users/yuhenghuang/Documents/Postdoc_UCI/Ancestral_recombination_graph/results/strong_mutation_rate_weight_2R.tsv")
strong_snp_3L <- read_tsv("/Users/yuhenghuang/Documents/Postdoc_UCI/Ancestral_recombination_graph/results/strong_mutation_rate_weight_3L.tsv")
strong_snp_3R <- read_tsv("/Users/yuhenghuang/Documents/Postdoc_UCI/Ancestral_recombination_graph/results/strong_mutation_rate_weight_3R.tsv")
strong_snp_X <- read_tsv("/Users/yuhenghuang/Documents/Postdoc_UCI/Ancestral_recombination_graph/results/strong_mutation_rate_weight_X.tsv")
strong_snp <- bind_rows(list(strong_snp_2L, strong_snp_2R, strong_snp_3L, strong_snp_3R, strong_snp_X))

neutral_snp_2L <- read_tsv("/Users/yuhenghuang/Documents/Postdoc_UCI/Ancestral_recombination_graph/results/neutral_mutation_rate_weight_2L.tsv")
neutral_snp_2R <- read_tsv("/Users/yuhenghuang/Documents/Postdoc_UCI/Ancestral_recombination_graph/results/neutral_mutation_rate_weight_2R.tsv")
neutral_snp_3L <- read_tsv("/Users/yuhenghuang/Documents/Postdoc_UCI/Ancestral_recombination_graph/results/neutral_mutation_rate_weight_3L.tsv")
neutral_snp_3R <- read_tsv("/Users/yuhenghuang/Documents/Postdoc_UCI/Ancestral_recombination_graph/results/neutral_mutation_rate_weight_3R.tsv")
neutral_snp_X <- read_tsv("/Users/yuhenghuang/Documents/Postdoc_UCI/Ancestral_recombination_graph/results/neutral_mutation_rate_weight_X.tsv")
neutral_snp <- bind_rows(list(neutral_snp_2L, neutral_snp_2R, neutral_snp_3L, neutral_snp_3R, neutral_snp_X))

TE_family_info <- TE_test |> 
  mutate(name_lowercase = tolower(te_name)) |> 
  left_join(te_family_class |> mutate(id = tolower(te_family)), 
            join_by(name_lowercase == id)) |> 
  filter(!is.na(class)) |> 
  mutate(category = if_else(class == "DNA", "DNA", "RNA"))
 
#TE_family_info <- TE_test |>
#  left_join(TE_family_class, join_by(te_name == Family))
              
              
TE_ps_test <- TE_family_info |> 
select(1:4, class, category, ends_with("te_age"), intersect(contains("bin"), ends_with("te_rate")))
#select(1:3, Class, Order, ends_with("te_age"), intersect(contains("bin"), ends_with("te_rate")))
withTE_cols  <- seq(57, ncol(TE_ps_test), by = 2)
withoutTE_cols <- seq(58, ncol(TE_ps_test), by = 2)

TE_ps_test$withTE_means <- apply(TE_ps_test[, withTE_cols], 1, mean, na.rm = TRUE)
TE_ps_test$withoutTE_means <- apply(TE_ps_test[, withoutTE_cols], 1, mean, na.rm = TRUE)
TE_ps_test$age_means <- apply(TE_ps_test[, 7:56], 1, mean, na.rm = TRUE)
TE_test_data <- TE_ps_test |> 
  select(1:6, withTE_means, withoutTE_means, age_means)


output_path <- "/Users/yuhenghuang/Documents/Postdoc_UCI/Ancestral_recombination_graph/"
output_file <- paste0(output_path, "TE_data_age_with_withoutTE_mutation.txt")
write.table(TE_test_data, file = output_file, col.names = T, row.names = FALSE, quote = FALSE)


DNA_TE_mu <- TE_test_test |> 
  filter(category == "DNA") |> 
  #filter(Class == "DNA") |> 
  #filter(num_carriers >= 4) |> 
  filter(!is.na(withTE_means) & !is.na(withoutTE_means)) |> 
  filter(age_means >= 5000 & age_means <= 500000)

RNA_TE_mu <- TE_permut_test |> 
  filter(category == "RNA") |> 
  #filter(Class == "RNA") |> 
  #filter(num_carriers >= 4) |> 
  filter(!is.na(withTE_means) & !is.na(withoutTE_means)) |> 
  filter(age_means >= 5000 & age_means <= 500000)

median(DNA_TE_mu$withTE_means, na.rm = TRUE); median(DNA_TE_mu$withoutTE_means, na.rm = TRUE)
wilcox.test(DNA_TE_mu$withTE_means, DNA_TE_mu$withoutTE_means, paired = T)
t.test(DNA_TE_mu$withTE_means, DNA_TE_mu$withoutTE_means, paired = T)

median(RNA_TE_mu$withTE_means, na.rm = TRUE); median(RNA_TE_mu$withoutTE_means, na.rm = TRUE)
wilcox.test(RNA_TE_mu$withTE_means, RNA_TE_mu$withoutTE_means, paired = T)
t.test(RNA_TE_mu$withTE_means, RNA_TE_mu$withoutTE_means, paired = T)


strong_snp_test <- strong_snp |> 
  select(1:3, ends_with("te_age"), intersect(contains("bin"), ends_with("te_rate")))
withTE_cols  <- seq(54, ncol(strong_snp_test), by = 2)
withoutTE_cols <- seq(55, ncol(strong_snp_test), by = 2)

strong_snp_test$withTE_means <- apply(strong_snp_test[, withTE_cols], 1, mean, na.rm = TRUE)
strong_snp_test$withoutTE_means <- apply(strong_snp_test[, withoutTE_cols], 1, mean, na.rm = TRUE)
strong_snp_test$age_means <- apply(strong_snp_test[, 4:53], 1, mean, na.rm = TRUE)
strong_snp_mu <- strong_snp_test |> 
  #filter(num_carriers >= 4) |> 
  filter(age_means >= 10000 & age_means <= 100000)

median(strong_snp_mu$withTE_means, na.rm = TRUE); median(strong_snp_mu$withoutTE_means, na.rm = TRUE)
wilcox.test(strong_snp_mu$withTE_means, strong_snp_mu$withoutTE_means, paired = T)
t.test(strong_snp_mu$withTE_means, strong_snp_mu$withoutTE_means, paired = T)
cor.test(strong_snp_mu$age_means, strong_snp_mu$withTE_means, method = "spearman")
cor.test(strong_snp_mu$age_means, strong_snp_mu$withoutTE_means, method = "spearman")

neutral_snp_test <- neutral_snp |> 
  select(1:3, ends_with("te_age"), intersect(contains("bin"), ends_with("te_rate")))
withTE_cols  <- seq(54, ncol(neutral_snp_test), by = 2)
withoutTE_cols <- seq(55, ncol(neutral_snp_test), by = 2)

neutral_snp_test$withTE_means <- apply(neutral_snp_test[, withTE_cols], 1, mean, na.rm = TRUE)
neutral_snp_test$withoutTE_means <- apply(neutral_snp_test[, withoutTE_cols], 1, mean, na.rm = TRUE)
neutral_snp_test$age_means <- apply(neutral_snp_test[, 4:53], 1, mean, na.rm = TRUE)
neutral_snp_mu <- neutral_snp_test |> 
  #filter(num_carriers >= 4) |> 
  filter(age_means >= 5000 & age_means <= 500000)

median(neutral_snp_mu$withTE_means, na.rm = TRUE); median(neutral_snp_mu$withoutTE_means, na.rm = TRUE)
wilcox.test(neutral_snp_mu$withTE_means, neutral_snp_mu$withoutTE_means, paired = T)
t.test(neutral_snp_mu$withTE_means, neutral_snp_mu$withoutTE_means, paired = T)
cor.test(strong_snp_mu$age_means, strong_snp_mu$withTE_means, method = "spearman")
cor.test(strong_snp_mu$age_means, strong_snp_mu$withoutTE_means, method = "spearman")


TE_mutation_rate <- TE_family_info |> 
  filter(category == "DNA") |> 
  #filter(num_carriers >= 4) |> 
  filter(te_age >= 5000) |> 
  #drop_na(ctrl_with_te_rate, ctrl_without_te_rate) |> 
  pivot_longer(
    #cols = c(ctrl_with_te_rate, ctrl_without_te_rate),
    #cols = c(ctrl_bin2_2000_5000_with_te_rate, ctrl_bin2_2000_5000_without_te_rate),
    #cols = c(with_te_rate, without_te_rate),
    #cols = c(bin2_2000_5000_with_te_rate, bin2_2000_5000_without_te_rate),
    cols = c(perm_bin2_2000_5000_with_te_rate, perm_bin2_2000_5000_without_te_rate),
    names_to = "haplotype_group",
    values_to = "mutation_rate"
  ) 

p1 <- ggplot(TE_mutation_rate, aes(x = haplotype_group, y = mutation_rate, fill = haplotype_group, color = haplotype_group, group = haplotype_group)) + 
  scale_fill_manual(values=c('grey','#f073ab')) +
  geom_violin(width = 1, color = "black") +
  geom_boxplot(width = 0.07, color = "black", alpha = 0.5) +
  labs(x = "haplotype type", y = "mutation rate") +
  ylim(0,10^-8) +
  mytheme
p1
#ggsave(file = paste("/Users/yuhenghuang/Documents/Postdoc_UCI/Ancestral_recombination_graph/plot/RNA_TE_mutation_rates_compare.pdf", sep = ""), plot = p1, width = 8, height = 6)

w_te = TE_mutation_rate |> 
  #filter(haplotype_group == "ctrl_with_te_rate")
  #filter(haplotype_group == "ctrl_bin2_2000_5000_with_te_rate")
  #filter(haplotype_group == "with_te_rate")
  filter(haplotype_group == "perm_bin2_2000_5000_with_te_rate")
wo_te = TE_mutation_rate |> 
  #filter(haplotype_group == "ctrl_without_te_rate")
  #filter(haplotype_group == "ctrl_bin2_2000_5000_without_te_rate")
  #filter(haplotype_group == "without_te_rate")
  filter(haplotype_group == "perm_bin2_2000_5000_without_te_rate")

wilcox.test(w_te$mutation_rate, wo_te$mutation_rate, paired = T)
mean(w_te$mutation_rate, na.rm = T);mean(wo_te$mutation_rate, na.rm = T)
median(w_te$mutation_rate, na.rm = T);median(wo_te$mutation_rate, na.rm = T)


output_path <- "/Users/yuhenghuang/Documents/Postdoc_UCI/Ancestral_recombination_graph/"
output_file <- paste0(output_path, "TE_data_age_with_withoutTE_mutation.txt")
write.table(A7_trans_piRNA_count, file = output_file, col.names = T, row.names = FALSE, quote = FALSE)


```

### c. K9 and estimated u

```{r}
#| label: K9_mutation
#| warning: false
#| echo: false
#| fig-width: 5
#| fig-height: 3
#| fig-align: "center"

hist = "A4"
A4_TE_K9 <- read_tsv(paste0("/Users/yuhenghuang/Documents/Postdoc_UCI/TE_mutation_rate/Results/CUT_Tag_output/", hist, "_TE_height_HMD_25_5000_50_mean_each_measures_mahul_annotated.txt"), col_names = F)
list_A4 <- A4_TE_K9 |> 
mutate(K9_enrich = (X10 + X11 + X12 + X13)/4,
       category = if_else(K9_enrich > 1, "enrich", "not_enrich"), .keep = "all"
       )|> 
  select(X1:X8, K9_enrich, category)


hist = "A6"
A6_TE_K9 <- read_tsv(paste0("/Users/yuhenghuang/Documents/Postdoc_UCI/TE_mutation_rate/Results/CUT_Tag_output/", hist, "_TE_height_HMD_25_5000_50_mean_each_measures_mahul_annotated.txt"), col_names = F)
list_A6 <- A6_TE_K9 |> 
mutate(K9_enrich = (X10 + X11 + X12 + X13 + X14 + X15)/6,
       category = if_else(K9_enrich > 1, "enrich", "not_enrich"), .keep = "all"
       )  |> 
  select(X1:X8, K9_enrich, category)

hist = "A7"
A7_TE_K9 <- read_tsv(paste0("/Users/yuhenghuang/Documents/Postdoc_UCI/TE_mutation_rate/Results/CUT_Tag_output/", hist, "_TE_height_HMD_25_5000_50_mean_each_measures_mahul_annotated.txt"), col_names = F)
list_A7 <- A7_TE_K9 |> 
mutate(across(X10:X15, as.numeric),
      K9_enrich = (X10 + X11 + X12 + X13 + X14 + X15)/6,
       category = if_else(K9_enrich > 1, "enrich", "not_enrich"), .keep = "all"
       )  |> 
    select(X1:X8, K9_enrich, category)

three_strains <- bind_rows(list(list_A4, list_A6, list_A7)) |> 
  mutate(site = (X2 + X3)/2)

output_path <- "/Users/yuhenghuang/Documents/Postdoc_UCI/Ancestral_recombination_graph/"
output_file <- paste0(output_path, "K9_data_A4_A6_A7.txt")
write.table(three_strains, file = output_file, col.names = T, row.names = FALSE, quote = FALSE)


setDT(TE_test_data); setDT(three_strains)
TE_test_data[, original_position := position]

setkey(TE_test_data, group_name, position)
setkey(three_strains, X1, site)

join_closest <- TE_test_data[three_strains, on = .(group_name = X1, position = site), roll = "nearest"]

TE_K9_identify <- join_closest |> 
  mutate(dif_posi = abs(position - original_position),
        Name_pop = te_name) |> 
  filter(dif_posi < 200 & X8 == Name_pop) |> 
    filter(age_means >= 5000)


TE_K9_not_enrich <- TE_K9_identify |> 
  #filter(category == "enrich")
  filter(category == "not_enrich")

TE_K9_enrich <- TE_K9_identify |> 
  filter(category == "enrich")
  #filter(category == "not_enrich")

median_withTE_K9_not_enrich = median(TE_K9_not_enrich$withTE_means, na.rm = T)
median_withoutTE_K9_not_enrich = median(TE_K9_not_enrich$withoutTE_means, na.rm = T)

median_withTE_K9_enrich = median(TE_K9_enrich$withTE_means, na.rm = T)
median_withoutTE_K9_enrich = median(TE_K9_enrich$withoutTE_means, na.rm = T)

mean_dif = mean(TE_K9_test$dif_mut_rate, na.rm = T); median_dif = median(TE_K9_test$dif_mut_rate, na.rm = T)
mean_dif;median_dif

perm_mean=c(); perm_median=c()
for (i in 1:5){
  index = 7 + i*2
  print(index)
  perm_dif = TE_K9_test[[index]] - TE_K9_test[[index + 1]]
  perm_mean = c(perm_mean, mean(perm_dif, na.rm = T))
  perm_median = c(perm_median, median(perm_dif, na.rm = T))
} 
sum(perm_mean < mean_dif)
sum(perm_median < median_dif)
```
